page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg8i.48xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by Intel Xeon 8475B processors running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance features 192 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, resulting in 192 vCPUs. It is equipped with 1024.0 GB of system memory, providing 5.33 GB of RAM per core. The underlying virtualization is managed via the KVM hypervisor.

This server type does not include local storage, requiring external block storage solutions for data persistence. It also lacks integrated GPU accelerators. However, it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps, which supports high-throughput networking requirements.

With its high physical core count and dedicated CPU allocation, the instance offers high resource density for parallel processing tasks. The qualitative cost efficiency of this hardware profile is centered on its massive memory capacity and dedicated CPU execution, making it suitable for large-scale enterprise workloads, memory-intensive databases, and distributed computing tasks that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg8i.48xlarge is an x86_64 server instance powered by Intel Xeon 8475B processors operating at 2.7 GHz. It features 192 dedicated physical cores with one thread per core, providing 192 vCPUs alongside 1024.0 GB of RAM, which equates to 5.33 GB of memory per core. Running on the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, meaning all storage must be attached externally. The high core count and dedicated CPU allocation make this instance suitable for large-scale enterprise applications, memory-intensive databases, and parallel processing workloads that require substantial memory and network throughput without the need for local disk storage or hardware acceleration.
